name: nudge-permutation-tester
description: Testing script for generating all nudge permutations

scripts.test:huggingface: npm run build && node dist/generateNudgePermutations.js --provider huggingface --sample 1
scripts.test:securegpt: npm run build && node dist/generateNudgePermutations.js --provider securegpt --sample 1
scripts.test:openai: npm run build && node dist/generateNudgePermutations.js --provider openai --sample 1
scripts.test:all: npm run build && node dist/generateNudgePermutations.js --provider all --sample 1
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && node dist/generateNudgePermutations.js --model llama4-maverick --sample 1
scripts.test:prompt-constants: npm run test:prompt-constants:ts && npm run test:prompt-constants:py
